# Bishow Shrestha - Senior Software Engineer Portfolio

> Personal portfolio website of Bishow Kaji Shrestha, a Senior Software Engineer with 6+ years of experience in full-stack development.

## About

Bishow Kaji Shrestha is a Senior Software Engineer at Infinite Computer Solutions with expertise in:
- **Languages & Frameworks**: C#, .NET Core, ASP.NET Core, Angular, TypeScript, jQuery
- **Databases**: SQL Server, Oracle, PostgreSQL, Redis
- **Domain Expertise**: Healthcare (HIPAA), Core Banking Systems, Agro Management, Insurance
- **Certifications**: Certified SAFe® Practitioner (2024), Registered Scrum Master (2021)
- **Methodologies**: Agile, Scrum, SAFe, Microservices Architecture

## Professional Experience

1. **Senior Software Engineer** - Infinite Computer Solutions (Feb 2024 - Present)
2. **Software Engineer** - Cotiviti Nepal (Jan 2023 - Jan 2024)
3. **Associate Team Lead** - InfoDevelopers Pvt. Ltd. (Oct 2021 - Jan 2023)
4. **Sr. Software Engineer** - InfoDevelopers Pvt. Ltd. (Dec 2020 - Oct 2021)
5. **Software Developer** - InfoDevelopers Pvt. Ltd. (Mar 2020 - Dec 2020)
6. **Junior .NET Developer** - BitsPanda Technology (Dec 2019 - Feb 2020)

## Education

- **Master of Information Technology** - MIT, Australia (Ongoing)
- **Bachelor of Computer Application** - Tribhuvan University (2021)
- **+2 Science** - National Examination Board (2014)
- **School Leaving Certificate** - Government of Nepal (2012)

## Site Structure

- **Home**: Main landing page with introduction
- **About**: Professional background and career summary
- **Resume**: Detailed education and work experience
- **Skills**: Technical expertise and domain knowledge
- **Tools**: Development tools and utilities showcase
- **Services**: Professional services offered
- **Projects**: Portfolio of completed projects
- **Blog**: Technical articles and insights
- **Contact**: Get in touch information

## Key Projects

- Healthcare systems with HIPAA compliance
- Core Banking System (CBS) development
- Government financial systems
- Agro-related CMS solutions
- Microservices architecture implementations

## Technical Skills

**Languages**: C#, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, SQL
**Frameworks**: .NET Core, ASP.NET Core, Angular, jQuery, Bootstrap
**Databases**: SQL Server, Oracle, PostgreSQL, Redis
**Tools**: Git, JIRA, Jenkins, Bitbucket, Bamboo, Octopus Deploy, Telerik Reporting
**Specialized**: OCR, Identity Server, Elastic Search, RabbitMQ, SignalR, RESTful API
